sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40705" key="e)pirrakto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιρρακτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n40705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dashed on</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">down</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θύρα ἐπιρρακτή</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trap</tr_>-door, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.781e</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ποτόν</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forced down</tr_> the throat, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">699d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
